absorption: Son 5 bardaki agir satis baskisi (-577 delta sum) fiyatin direncte yuttugu ancak yukselemeyen yapida absorption gorulmuyor, ancak ask depth (102) bid depth (42) ile net satis baskisi var.
dom_observation: Bid/Ask ratio 0.41 - keskin satis baskisi, ask derinligi 2.4x bid derinliginden fazla, liquidation baskisi yuksek.
htf_alignment: 5m+15m+1h+4h tumu BEAR - tam HTF uyum, SHORT icin ideal.
session_bias: Buy/Sell ratio 0.73 (<0.8) + session delta -2.494M (guclu satis) + sell_volume 9.2M vs buy_volume 6.7M = gun boyunca agir satis baskisi.
reasoning: CVD -5.2M agir negatif + tum HTF BEAR + DOM ask baskili + delta_sum_5bars -577 + session satis hakimiyeti (0.73 ratio) = net SHORT setup, VAH ustunde rejection gorulmekte.
